issues_found.description: 5 expansion tracker live items have integrated=true but were never moved to the archive. Items: EXP-293, EXP-294, EXP-295, EXP-296, EXP-300. These are terminal-state items that the integration writer or verifier failed to remove from live[] after marking integrated. Previous report (2026-05-09) flagged EXP-293 alone; four more have since accumulated.
issues_found.suggested_fix: For each item in the set, append the item JSON to expansion-tracker-archive.jsonl then remove it from expansion-tracker.json items[]. Can be done in a single decider atomic write. Guard: if(item.integrated === true && !archiveIds.has(item.id)) move to archive.

Files: suggested-patches-2026-05-07T01-16.json (8 pending), suggested-patches-2026-05-08T13-16.json (2 pending), suggested-patches-2026-05-09T08-48.json (4 pending), suggested-patches-2026-05-09T09-26.json (2 pending). Total: 16 unapplied patch proposals.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Decider should run apply-or-reject pass on each. Some may be superseded by subsequent decider runs; those should be marked status=superseded.

issues_found.suggested_fix: Operator: set verdict='Self-Contradicted' in wins.json for id=055, run node build.js html && node test.js, then git push from clean clone.

issues_found.suggested_fix: Known wontfix — ISS-1884 closed as wontfix. The gap is a historical artifact and does not affect pipeline operation.

summary: Site is structurally sound. test.js passed 3592/0. Build reproduced successfully at 1485.5 KB. All discoverability infrastructure (llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, meta tags, ClaimReview schema) present and valid. External data-source links healthy (NOAA root 403 is bot-blocking, not a real break). Workspace-sync confirmed working: remote git matches workspace at 505 reviews / 389 expansions. Expansion tracker next_id correct (301 > max 300), live/archive disjoint, 0 orphaned files. One moderate finding: 5 expansion tracker live items (EXP-293/294/295/296/300) with integrated=true were never moved to archive — the prior report flagged EXP-293 alone, four more have since accumulated without the live→archive move firing. Two minor untracked findings: 16 unapplied patch proposals across 4 stranded suggested-patches files (May 7–9), and NOAA root 403. WIN-055 verdict change is pending operator action (tracked ISS-1924). Overall: warn due to accumulated stuck live items and stranded patches. No critical or major findings.
